title: ManePear's modified scythe datapack
description: This datapack adds a slightly modified version of ManePear's scythe.
body:
This datapack adds a slightly modified scythe from ManePear's videos to your minecraft world. 

This would be the link for the resourcepack:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/manepear-modified-scythe-resourcepack

**Important: The datapack won't work on its own which means that you have to download the resource pack aswell.
The datapack leaves all the items in the world as they are! It just adds a new item: The scythe.**

Modifiers of the scythe: Attack damage: 13, Attack speed: -2, While holding the item: speed, 20 hearts total, Texture modifiers: some blood drops were added, custom crafting recipe

Also make sure that you have installed the datapack correctly. Remember, its not a mod which means you cant put it in your mods folder.

Possible enchantements:
Breach 1-4, Density 1-5, Wind burst 1-3, Fire aspect 1-2, Unbreaking 1-3, Smite 1-5, Mending

I have made the real scythe from the videos aswell so go check it out too!
(https://modrinth.com/datapack/scythe-manepear)
